selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next paired math-class reduction target on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the entropy contract math-class packet into controller-facing scalar, probability, metric, selection, and semantic anti-overread fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Completes the immediate engine / entropy / geometry trio after the entropy-contract pass.
Strongest non-math-class follow-on once the trio is cleared.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the scalar-language guardrails tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: SCALARS_REQUIRE_FINITE_SCOPE_AND_NO_IDENTITY_FORCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves entropy-like scalars as finite-scope descriptive abstractions rather than identity-bearing objects.

candidate_items.name: ENTROPY_LANGUAGE_DOES_NOT_IMPORT_PROBABILITY_RATE_OR_UTILITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent’s main translational-overread risk into a controller fence against probability, rate, and utility imports.

candidate_items.name: SCALAR_LAWS_ARE_NOT_DEFAULTS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps monotonicity, additivity, accumulation, and convergence from becoming default scalar law.

candidate_items.name: NO_METRICIZATION_OR_COMMON_SCALE_COLLAPSE_FROM_SCALARS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves anti-metricization and scalar-plurality boundaries for controller use.

candidate_items.name: SCALARS_DO_NOT_GOVERN_ADMISSIBILITY_SELECTION_OR_MEANING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent’s anti-selection and anti-semantic-completion rules into a controller guard.

quarantined_items.name: ENTROPY_VOCABULARY_AS_THERMODYNAMIC_OR_PROBABILISTIC_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly blocks thermodynamic, probabilistic, and expectation-style imports while preserving the lexical temptation.

quarantined_items.name: SCALAR_VALUES_AS_HIDDEN_RANKING_OR_CANONICAL_CHOICE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent keeps scalar outputs descriptive only and denies ranking, admissibility, and unique-choice governance powers.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier twelve controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the thirteenth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
